name: AgentWard
description: Five-layer security guardrails for OpenClaw sessions.

enableFoundationScanDetection.description: When enabled, detects security bypass instructions in system prompt files.

enableIntervention.description: When true, executes intervention measures (blocking tool calls) when threats are detected. When false, only performs detection, logging, and warning notifications without intervention.

blockToolCallOnFoundationScanWarning.description: When true, tool calls are blocked when security bypass is detected in system prompt files.

enable.description: When enabled, scans skill files for malicious instructions.

ruleBasedDetection.description: When enabled, uses regex patterns to detect malicious content.

semanticDetection.description: When enabled, uses LLM to semantically analyze skill files.

maxContentLength.description: Maximum number of characters to analyze in semantic detection. Default: 65536

maxConcurrency.description: Maximum number of skills to scan in parallel. Default: 10

enable.description: When enabled, scans configuration files for security misconfigurations.

enableInputDetection.description: When enabled, detects profanity and injection attempts in tool results.

enableIntervention.description: When true, executes intervention measures (blocking tool calls, covering responses) when threats are detected. When false, only performs detection, logging, and warning notifications without intervention.

blockHarmfulInput.description: When true, harmful content is blocked entirely. When false, a warning is appended to the content.

coverContaminatedResponse.description: When true, replaces the assistant's response (after receiving harmful tool results) with warning messages. Original assistant responses are not persisted.

enableMemWriteDetection.description: When enabled, detects abnormal patterns in memory file modifications.

enableIntervention.description: When true, blocks tool calls when memory anomalies are detected. When false, only performs detection, logging, and warning notifications without blocking.

enableDecisionAlignmentDetection.description: When enabled, monitors assistant responses for decision alignment issues.

enableIntervention.description: When true, temporarily blocks tool calls when decision misalignment is detected. When false, only performs detection, logging, and warning notifications without blocking.

enableToolCallDetection.description: When enabled, detects dangerous commands in tool calls.

enableIntervention.description: When true, blocks dangerous tool calls. When false, only performs detection, logging, and warning notifications without blocking.

provider.description: Optional provider override for decision alignment model calls.

model.description: Optional model id override for decision alignment model calls.

api.description: Optional API type override (for example openai-completions, anthropic-messages).

baseUrl.description: Optional base URL override for provider endpoint.

apiKeyEnv.description: Environment variable name for API key. Default: AGENT_WARD_API_KEY.

enableFileLog.description: When enabled, logs are written to a file

layers.foundationScan.enableFoundationSc.label: Enable System Prompt Detection
layers.foundationScan.enableFoundationSc.help: When enabled, detects security bypass instructions in system prompt files.

llm.provider.label: LLM Provider
llm.provider.help: Optional override. If set with model/api/baseUrl + env key, AgentWard uses this before runtime model resolution.

llm.model.label: LLM Model
llm.model.help: Optional override model id for decision alignment.

llm.api.label: LLM API Type
llm.api.help: Optional provider API type, for example openai-completions or anthropic-messages.

llm.baseUrl.label: LLM Base URL
llm.baseUrl.help: Optional provider base URL for decision alignment model calls.

llm.apiKeyEnv.label: LLM API Key Env
llm.apiKeyEnv.help: Environment variable name for API key. Default: AGENT_WARD_API_KEY.

layers.foundationScan.enableIntervention.label: Enable Foundation Scan Intervention
layers.foundationScan.enableIntervention.help: When true, blocks tool calls when threats are detected. When false, only logs and sends warnings without blocking.

layers.foundationScan.blockToolCallOnFou.label: Block Tool Calls on System Prompt Warning
layers.foundationScan.blockToolCallOnFou.help: When true, tool calls are blocked when security bypass is detected in system prompt files.

layers.inputSanitization.enableInputDete.label: Enable Input Detection
layers.inputSanitization.enableInputDete.help: When enabled, detects profanity and injection attempts in tool results.

layers.inputSanitization.enableIntervent.label: Enable Input Sanitization Intervention
layers.inputSanitization.enableIntervent.help: When true, blocks tool calls and covers responses when threats are detected. When false, only logs and sends warnings without intervention.

layers.inputSanitization.blockHarmfulInp.label: Block Harmful Input
layers.inputSanitization.blockHarmfulInp.help: When true, harmful content is blocked entirely. When false, a warning is appended to the content.

layers.inputSanitization.coverContaminat.label: Cover Contaminated Response
layers.inputSanitization.coverContaminat.help: When true, replaces the assistant's response (after receiving harmful tool results) with warning messages. Original assistant responses are not persisted.

layers.cognitionProtection.enableMemWrit.label: Enable Memory Write Detection
layers.cognitionProtection.enableMemWrit.help: When enabled, detects abnormal patterns in memory file modifications.

layers.cognitionProtection.enableInterve.label: Enable Cognition State Intervention
layers.cognitionProtection.enableInterve.help: When true, blocks tool calls when memory anomalies are detected. When false, only logs and sends warnings without blocking.

layers.decisionAlignment.enableDecisionA.label: Enable Decision Alignment Detection
layers.decisionAlignment.enableDecisionA.help: When enabled, monitors assistant responses for decision alignment issues.

layers.decisionAlignment.enableIntervent.label: Enable Decision Align Intervention
layers.decisionAlignment.enableIntervent.help: When true, temporarily blocks tool calls when decision misalignment is detected. When false, only logs and sends warnings without blocking.

layers.execControl.enableToolCallDetecti.label: Enable Tool Call Detection
layers.execControl.enableToolCallDetecti.help: When enabled, detects dangerous commands in tool calls.

layers.execControl.enableIntervention.label: Enable Exec Control Intervention
layers.execControl.enableIntervention.help: When true, blocks dangerous tool calls. When false, only logs and sends warnings without blocking.

worker.timeout.label: Worker Timeout (ms)
worker.timeout.help: Timeout for worker requests in milliseconds. Default: 60000

worker.logLevel.label: Worker Log Level
worker.logLevel.help: Log level for worker: info, debug, warn, error
